betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Hardened Fluiduct§f

§aHandle lava, gelid cryotheum, and other extreme-temperature fluids safely through your duct network!§f

§bHardened Fluiducts§f function identically to basic fluiducts but do not break when carrying hot or cold fluids. Essential for §bMagma Crucible§f output, §bCryotheum§f-based cooling loops, and any high-temperature refinery setup.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Transparent§f: §e1× Invar Ingot§f + §e1× Glass§f → §e6× Hardened Fluiduct§f.
§b• Opaque§f: §e1× Invar Ingot§f + §e1× Lead Ingot§f → §e6× Hardened Fluiduct (Opaque)§f.

§6Upgrade Path§f:
§bHardened§f is the second tier in the fluiduct line. Higher tiers (§bSignalum-Plated§f, §bSuper-Laminar§f) provide increased throughput, but only Hardened unlocks resistance to extreme temperatures.

§eTip§f: If you plan to run §bGelid Cryotheum§f as a coolant or §bBlazing Pyrotheum§f as fuel, Hardened Fluiducts are mandatory — basic fluiducts will break on contact and spill the fluid.
